message: 🌱 Add istio: Support regex for ServiceRole spec.rules.paths mission (#363)

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,80 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "istio-16585-support-regex-for-servicerole-spec-rules-paths",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "istio: Support regex for ServiceRole spec.rules.paths",
+    "description": "Support regex for ServiceRole spec.rules.paths. This issue affects 63+ users.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify istio troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your istio deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n cert-manager -l app=istio\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=istio -n cert-manager --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for errors related to: Support regex for ServiceRole spec.rules.paths"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Check current Service configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant istio resources:\n```bash\nkubectl get service -A\nkubectl describe service <name> -n <namespace>\n```\n(This is used to request new product features, please visit <https://discuss.istio.io> for questions on using Istio)\n\n**Describe the feature request**\nSupport regex paths for ServiceRole spec.rules.pa"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Support regex for ServiceRole spec.rules.paths",
+        "description": "+1\nKnative on Istio have to use `triggerRules.excludedPaths.{exact,prefix}` for authentication policy as knative service gets health checking and metrics collection from external(knative system pods). So this feature is really necessary.\nCloud Run's solution also suggested it [here](https://cloud.go\n```yaml\napiVersion: rbac.istio.io/v1alpha1\r\nkind: ServiceRole\r\nmetadata:\r\n  name: view-swagger\r\n  namespace: dp\r\nspec:\r\n  rules:\r\n  - services: [\"*\"]\r\n    paths:\r\n    - \"*/swagger-ui.html\"\r\n    - \"*/api-docs\"\r\n    - \"*/swagger-resources\"\r\n    - \"*/swagger-resources/configuration/ui\"\r\n    - \"*/swagger-resources/configuration/security\"\r\n    - \"*/springfox-swagger-ui/fonts/open-sans-v15-latin-regular.woff2\"\r\n    - \"*/springfox-swagger-ui/fonts/open-sans-v15-latin-700.woff2\"\r\n    - \"*/springfox-swagger-ui/fonts/source-code-pro-v7-latin-300.woff2\"\r\n    - \"*/springfox-swagger-ui/fonts/titillium-web-v6-latin\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm Support regex for ServiceRole spec.rules.paths is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=istio -n cert-manager --tail=50 --since=5m\nkubectl get events -n cert-manager --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "The root cause is: +1\nKnative on Istio have to use `triggerRules.excludedPaths.{exact,prefix}` for authentication policy as knative service gets health checking and metrics collection from external(knative system pods). So this feature is really necessary.\nCloud Run's solution also suggested it [here](https://cloud.google.com/solutions/authorizing-access-to-cloud-run-on-gke-services-using-istio#configuring_istio_aut. This fixes the issue because it addresses the underlying problem that was causing the failure.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "apiVersion: rbac.istio.io/v1alpha1\r\nkind: ServiceRole\r\nmetadata:\r\n  name: view-swagger\r\n  namespace: dp\r\nspec:\r\n  rules:\r\n  - services: [\"*\"]\r\n    paths:\r\n    - \"*/swagger-ui.html\"\r\n    - \"*/api-docs\"\r\n    - \"*/swagger-resources\"\r\n    - \"*/swagger-resources/configuration/ui\"\r\n    - \"*/swagger-resources/configuration/security\"\r\n    - \"*/springfox-swagger-ui/fonts/open-sans-v15-latin-regular.woff2\"\r\n    - \"*/springfox-swagger-ui/fonts/open-sans-v15-latin-700.woff2\"\r\n    - \"*/springfox-swagger-ui/fonts/source-code-pro-v7-latin-300.woff2\"\r\n    - \"*/springfox-swagger-ui/fonts/titillium-web-v6-latin-700.woff2\"\r\n    - \"*/springfox-swagger-ui/springfox.js?v=2.9.2\"\r\n    - \"*/springfox-swagger-ui/swagger-ui-bundle.js?v=2.9.2\"\r\n    - \"*/springfox-swagger-ui/swagger-ui-standalone-preset.js?v=2.9.2\"\r\n ",
+        "apiVersion: rbac.istio.io/v1alpha1\r\nkind: ServiceRole\r\nmetadata:\r\n  name: view-swagger\r\n  namespace: dp\r\nspec:\r\n  rules:\r\n  - services: [\"*\"]\r\n    regex_paths:\r\n    - \\/.*swagger.*\r\n    - \\/.*api-docs",
+        "paths:\r\n- exact: /v1\r\n- regex: \"\\/.*/docs\\/.*\"\r\n- prefix: /v2"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "istio",
+      "graduated",
+      "networking",
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "istio"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [
+      "Pod",
+      "Service",
+      "Namespace"
+    ],
+    "difficulty": "intermediate",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "graduated",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/istio/istio/issues/16585",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/istio/istio"
+    },
+    "reactions": 63,
+    "comments": 115,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with istio installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-10T05:31:54.762Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0",
+    "sanitized": true,
+    "findings": []
+  }
+}
